revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} Template to list useful external tools for assisting editors. == Usage == To transclude this template, just place :{{Editor tools}} where you want the box on the right to be displayed. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia tools]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} Template to list useful external tools for assisting editors. == Usage == To transclude this template, just place :{{Editor tools}} where you want the box on the right to be displayed. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia tools]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} Template to list useful external tools for assisting editors. == Usage == To transclude this template, just place :{{Editor tools}} where you want the box on the right to be displayed. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia tools]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} Template to list useful external tools for assisting editors. == Usage == To transclude this template, just place :{{Editor tools}} where you want the box on the right to be displayed. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia tools]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Editor_tools%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
